notes: Added PasswordStoreScanning protocol (Domain/Protocols) and FileManager-backed PasswordStoreScanner actor (Infrastructure/Store). Walks the store with FileManager.default.enumerator(at:) using [.skipsHiddenFiles]; ignores .git and .gpg-id; includes only regular .gpg files (case-insensitive); computes relative entry paths via EntryPathConverter; sorts via localizedStandardCompare. Caches per standardised store-root path; invalidate(storeRoot:) drops a single key. Logs only shape-only metadata via Log.discovery (count public, paths private). Note: FileManager is not Sendable and cannot be a stored actor property under strict concurrency, so injection of a custom FileManager was dropped; tests exercise the real filesystem via per-test temp directories. 9 deterministic XCTests added; full suite green (162 passed, 9 new). project.pbxproj unchanged (PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup).
